_comment: NON-NORMATIVE benchmark edge-case fixture for RFC-003 follow-up. Represents an older .klickd-style context that pre-dates the v4 draft fields ('handoff', 'verification_artifacts'). A v4 runner SHOULD emit a migration warning yet preserve all decision/identity data without loss. This file is NOT part of the v1 core 10-run flow.

context.summary: Older v3.0 context for the same v4 launch project. Persisted before the v4-draft 'handoff' and 'verification_artifacts' fields existed.
context.current_project: v4 launch of internal EdTech tool
decisions_locked: Mobile build remains paused until the security review is signed off.
